description: Domain Lens + Data/Tool Router + Module Artifact Contract R1 offline routing cases. These cases test whether OCEAN's new central routing layer covers common biomedical and biological research inputs without live API calls or model APIs.

cases.title: Abstract-only medical AI claim asks for direct cancer treatment guidance
cases.input: A DOI landing page says a radiology model improves AUC for cancer detection. Can this directly guide treatment?
cases.expected_stop_condition: Only abstract/landing-level evidence cannot support treatment guidance.

cases.title: scRNA-seq atlas expression used as mechanism proof
cases.input: A cell atlas shows gene X is high in tumor-associated macrophages. Does this prove gene X drives immune escape?
cases.expected_stop_condition: Atlas expression alone cannot prove mechanism.

cases.title: Open Targets target-disease association used as therapy proof
cases.input: Open Targets links target Y to disease Z. Can we claim inhibiting Y treats Z?
cases.expected_stop_condition: Target association is not therapeutic efficacy.

cases.title: ClinicalTrials registry metadata used as efficacy proof
cases.input: ClinicalTrials.gov has a completed trial for drug A in disease B. Does that prove efficacy?
cases.expected_stop_condition: Registry metadata alone cannot prove efficacy.

cases.title: KG edge used as causal mechanism
cases.input: A knowledge graph predicts gene C regulates pathway D. Can the manuscript say C causes D activation?
cases.expected_stop_condition: KG prediction is hypothesis support, not causality.

cases.title: Reviewer pressure converted into idea
cases.input: A public review says the manuscript lacks external validation and mechanism. What follow-up project can we design?
cases.expected_stop_condition: Reviewer text is pressure signal, not experimental fact.

cases.title: One-sentence biological AI idea asks for novelty
cases.input: Idea: use a protein language model to prioritize splice-impact variants. Is this novel enough for a paper?
cases.expected_stop_condition: Novelty cannot be claimed without bounded Current search.

cases.title: Collaboration contribution boundary from light advice
cases.input: I gave a few comments on the study idea and suggested two databases. Is that authorship-level?
cases.expected_stop_condition: Authorship cannot be decided without concrete contribution records and team criteria.

cases.title: GEO accession used for disease-specific mechanism
cases.input: A GEO dataset contains disease samples and controls. Can we claim the observed expression pattern is disease-specific mechanism?
cases.expected_stop_condition: Dataset presence/expression association does not prove disease-specific mechanism.

cases.title: Benchmark leaderboard asks for deployment readiness
cases.input: A model ranks first on a medical imaging leaderboard. Is it ready for hospital deployment?
cases.expected_stop_condition: Benchmark rank alone cannot prove deployment readiness.

cases.title: ClinVar pathogenic label used as treatment guidance
cases.input: ClinVar labels a variant as pathogenic. Can we recommend treatment choice?
cases.expected_stop_condition: Variant assertion alone cannot support patient-specific treatment guidance.

cases.title: Harbor stale report reuse
cases.input: Use last month's OCEAN report to decide today's journal positioning without new search.
cases.expected_stop_condition: Stale evidence needs a fresh source boundary before current positioning.
